description:
Install any app on Samsung Tizen devices вЂ” TVs, projectors and smart monitors

Cross-platform desktop installer that side-loads any app onto Samsung Smart TVs, projectors and smart monitors running Tizen OS вЂ” Jellyfin, Moonlight, Moonfin, Litefin and a community catalog, or your own WGT package. Handles device discovery, Tizen certificates and installation. Successor to Jellyfin2Samsung.Jellyfin2Samsung.
рџ“¦ v2.6.0 вЂ” 2026-07-07
рџ”Ђ Other changes
- Fix docker-build.sh after Jellyfin2Samsung в†’ Apps2Samsung rename (#417)
- Fix docker-build.sh after Jellyfin2Samsung в†’ Apps2Samsung rename (#417)
docker-build.sh still targets the pre-rename project, so it fails on
current master:
MSBUILD : error MSB1009: Project file does not exist.
Switch: Jellyfin2Samsung-CrossOS/Jellyfin2Samsung.csproj
#361 renamed the csproj/assembly to Apps2Samsung but did not update the
build
script. Fix - point the two hardcoded paths (and the header comment) at
the new name:
- PROJECT в†’ Jellyfin2Samsung-CrossOS/Apps2Samsung.csproj
- BIN в†’ .../publish/Apps2Samsung
Verified: ran ./docker-build.sh on current master (v2.5.7) in the
sdk:8.0
container - publish succeeds and produces the Apps2Samsung binary. by @PatrickSt1991 in #418
- Catalog: row-select preview + per-app versions (#420) + v2.6.0 (#424)
- Auto-detect OS language on first run (#421) (#423)
- Add Open Logs Folder button to error dialog (fixes #419) (#426)
New Contributors
- @eduardomozart made their first contribution in #426
Full Changelog: v2.5.7...v2.6.0
